title: Roasted Ukrainian Cashew Pastry
description: A traditional Ukrainian pastry filled with a delicious mixture of roasted cashews, perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Cashews
ingredients.notes: Roasted in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes

instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a bowl, mix together the roasted cashews, granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Place the mixture in the center of the pastry dough, leaving a 1-inch border around it.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with the remaining egg wash.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let the pastry cool for 10 minutes before serving.
